title: Content Relevance at Every Level
description: Every slide's content, analogy, and visual guidance must stay on-topic for that slide's heading and the session's takeaways. No tangents, no padding, no unrelated trivia.
criterion: Each content block advances the slide's stated heading/subheading; nothing off-topic or filler.

rubric.5: Every block directly supports the slide's point.
rubric.1: A slide contains an off-topic tangent or filler block.

input.heading: Why TCP needs a handshake
bullets: Both sides agree on starting sequence numbers
Confirms peer is reachable before sending data

cases.rationale: Both bullets are about the handshake's purpose.

input.heading: Why TCP needs a handshake
bullets: Both sides agree on sequence numbers
The internet was invented in 1969 by ARPANET

cases.rationale: Second bullet is unrelated trivia — off-topic.

input.heading: Flow control
bullets: We will now move on to the next exciting topic

cases.rationale: Second bullet is filler, adds no information.
